titleStmt.title: SII 18.111: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 111. (B.K. No. 60 of 1932-33.) HATTĪMATTŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing on the east bank of the hoṇḍa.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, is dated in Chālukya-Vikrama year 40, Manmatha, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Sunday. In the year cited, the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti occurred on December 25, A.D. 1115, which was a Saturday and not Sunday. The intended date probably was A.D. 1115, December 26, Sunday.

It states that when Mahāpradhāna Śrīpati-Daṇḍanāyaka was governing Puligeṟe Three-hundred and Beḷvala Three-hundred, the Mahājanas of the agrahāra town Partiyamattavura (modern Hattīmattūr, the find spot of the record) made a gift of the income derived from various taxes, for effecting repairs to the tank Dēviṁgeṟe. It also records similar gifts of money and land made to the same tank by many others. Mention is made of the two brothers of Śrīpati-Daṇḍanāyaka viz., Īs11vara-Daṇḍēs11vara and Sāvidēva and of Daṇḍanāyaka Antimayya and Mahāmātya Bāhubali. The last two are stated to be the subordinates of Śrīpati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ
vidvajjanābhīṣṭaphaḷapradāyaka nāmādisamastapraśa(ṁ)stisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ śrīpatidaṁḍanāyakaru puligeṟemūnūṟumaṁ beḷvalamūnūṟumaṁ su
kha saṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire . vritta . piriyaṁ śrīpatidaṁḍanāthanadhikāraśrīya peṁpiṁ
ndavīśvaradaṁḍēśvaranuṁ narēśvarana rājyaśrīge vikramacakravarttiya camū
nāthargge dignāthanennire daṁḍādhipa sāvidēvananivarddēvāṁśavēkōdarar . jayalakṣmī pati kuntaḷē
śvaranarēṁdraṁ mecce sarvvādhikāriyale śrīpatidaṁḍanāyakane rājādhyakṣamuṁ tāne cakri
ya saptārddhamahītaḷakkavaṟiyō dravyādhikārakka mudreya mudryāṁguḷikaṁ jaga
kkavenalāvaṁ śrīganaṁ pōltapaṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī maddaṇḍa
nāyakanantimayyaṁgaḷ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadināḷuttire . Āṟiveṁ śrīpati daṁḍanā
yakana tējōmūrtti tāneyde kaṇdeṟadaṁntippananantanabhyudayalakṣmīkāminīkāntanē taṟo
ḷaṁ tāne vasanta duṣṭahayasikṣārūḍharēvantanāntiṟivaṁgunte kritāntanintenisidaṁ daṁḍēśanantā
dhipa . vritta . patigartthaṁbaḍedīyaluṁ prajeyanantuṁ kāyaluṁ gaṁḍagarvvitavalvaṁ tave tēyaluṁ pa
ṭu mahāmātyaṁ budhastutyaniṁdamarabhūjaṁ sauryyabījaṁ prasannataraṁ
sāhasamūrtti bāhubali rājyaśrīgadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ . © sāramidu janada manake vicārisu
vaḍe sāravastuviṁ mattavuraṁ dhāriṇiya korala maṇimayahārada māḷkeyavo lagrahāra
midesaguṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhi śīḷasaṁpanna
rappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ parttiyamattavuradūroḍeyapramukhamahājanavinnūrvvarum sarvvaveḷasa
viṣṭhāṇadoḷirddu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada ḷaṁneya manmathasaṁvatsara duttarāyaṇa(ṇa)saṁkrānti vya
tīpātavādityavāradaṁdu vūramuntaṇa dēviṁgeṟege paḍisalisalu biṭṭa dharmmamenteṁdaḍe Aḍakeya
bhaṁḍake poṁge pāga Elege poṁgaḍḍamuṁ bēḷe Eleya pēṟiṁgeraḍuṁ vīsa Allavarisina vuddige poṁge
pāga voḍeyaru poṟaguydu māṟuva bhaṁḍakkarddhādāna poṟagaṇiṁ taṁdu māṟuva bhaṁḍa
ke poṁge bēḷe keṟeya tōṁṭavaṟuvaṇadiṁ keṟege tiṟuva gadyāṇaṁ panneraḍu karugaḷatige mā
lagāṟa nāvidanakkasāli baḍagiyintinibaruṁ pratyēkaṁ tiṟuva gadyāṇaveraḍu paṇaṁ mūṟara
lekkadiṁ tiṟuva gadyāṇaṁ padimūṟu paṇaveṁṭu keṟegaytavarmmaseṭṭiyarasiyakeṟeya pa
ḍuvaṇa meyya biṭṭere mattar panneraḍu davasakke mūlasāviyāyaṁ poṁge pāga śrī matpaḍavaḷa mācimaThe letterya is written below the line in smaller character.
yyaṁ keṟege biṭṭakkasāliyāyaṁ poṁge pāga Antu davasāyaṁ poṁgaḍḍa . vritta . sabheyoḷ tāni
re tējadoḷpuduguḍaṁ dēvaṁga Āsthānavallabhaninnūrvvara cakravuddhataragaṁḍaṁ vipra mārttāṁḍanugrabha
ṭaṁ sāhasikaṁ catussamayapādaṁ mācirājaṁ mahāprabhuvittaṁ keṟegakkasālada nibandhaṁ poṁ
ge pāgāyama . svasti śrīmatperjjuṁkada daṁḍanāyaka lōkarasaru dēviṁgeṟege biṭṭa dharmmamenteṁda
ḍe yirppattu maḷavegoṁdu maḷaveya suṁka yereḍu lakkaḍakeya suṁkamaṁ biṭṭarumattaṁ śrīmaddaṁḍaThe letter ke is written above the line in smaller character.
nāyaka vaḍḍarāvuḷada mailarasaruṁ dēviṁgeṟege biṭṭa dharmmamenteṁdaḍe yirppattu maḷavegoṁdu maḷave
ya suṁkamumaṁ yeraḍu lakkaḍakeya suṁkamumaṁ biṭṭa . ka . Ī keṟeyaṁ perjjuṁkada lōkarasaṁ nōḍi
mecci tīrtthasthānaṁ lōkadoḷideṁdu sujanāḷōkaṁ keṟegittanalte perjjuṁkadoḷa . karamosedu vaḍḍarāvuḷa
darasaṁ maiḷarasadaṁḍanāyakanuṁ lōkarasaṁ barasida paḍiyaṁ barasittaṁ tanna suṁkamaṁ sāśanadoḷ .
Ivara paḍi kēṇikāṟarnnevadiṁ suṁkamane keṟege salisiye paḍedarttavililladudgha kīrttiyanavaya
vadiṁ barmmadēva kalidēvaṇanuṁ . muṁkoṁḍu vaḍḍārāvuḷa suṁkamanī keṟege naḍasi perggaḍe jannaṁ suṁkadadhikā
ralakṣmiyinaṁkurisiye mēle matte saphaḷitanādaṁ . mattaṁ dēviṁgeṟege nālkuṁ kēriya prabhugaḷ ga
vuṁḍasvāmi kāḷimayyanuṁ ghaiśāsarasōvimayyanuṁ nāyakarasiṁgimayyanuṁ varagē
riya siriyayyanuvintivaru mukhyavāgi Innūrbbarumirddu mūlagāṟageyyiṁ teṁkele ḍevo
ladoḷage biṭṭa Eremattarirpphattu māvinakeṟeya keḷage biṭṭa makkimattar panneraḍu mattaṁ keṟege kone
kāṟara guḍige paṇa sulihakāṟaruḷige hāga koylāḷigaḷēṇigaḷa bojaṁgara kattigegaḍḍa kuṟiṁbara
nālkugāṇa rppaḍe
ṇnedāsi bācigaḷa keygaṁ garddegaṁ paṇavāṟu baḷiyara keyge tiṟuva paṇavāṟu saraviya keyge
paṇavāṟu mōriyara keyge paṇaṁ mūṟu keṟeyettiṁge garuḍanakaṁbhadiṁ mūḍal mane vondu
[Ī] keṟe dēviṁgeṟe mattīkeṟegī śivanadāśi biḍalaṟuvaṇamaṁ Ī keṟegudbhavamāytiṁnnī keṟeginnittavarggavakṣayapuṇyaṁ
keṟegeyyaṁ teregeygedaṁdu keṟeyaṁ koḷḷeṁdu pēḷvaṁgavī keṟegeyyoḷ teṟegoḷveneṁba bageyaṁ taṁdagavāmnāyadiṁ ke
ṟegāyaṁ naḍevantuṭaṁ naḍeyalinnānīyaneṁbaṁgavī keṟeyaṁ kaṁḍaḍe kāyvavaṁga narakaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ .
Abhivṛddhīśvarararāgi jīvisuge nammī grāmadinnūrvvaruṁ prabhuvuṁ kṣīrasamudradante keṟeyuṁ tī
vikke cāḷukyavallabhanuṁ cōḷananikki cōḷnelanmaṁ pāḷikke dīrgghāyuvakka bhivāṁchāphaḷamakke bā
hubaligācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara . svadattaṁ parada(ṁ)ttaṁ vā yō harēti vasu ndharāḥ ṣaṣṭivarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . perggaḍeyada cāmaṇaṁ baredaṁ maṁgaḷa ©
Digital edition of SII 18.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
